series_metadata.series_title: Investment Month End and Transition Documentation
series_metadata.series_description: These records include reconciliation documentation to support investment transitions for new or changing accounts and information to support month end investment journal entries in the general ledger system.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Electronic: electronic records on I: drive in a Financial Reporting folder ; Paper: 2 years in Financial Reporting unit, send offsite storage 3 years –
